summary: Iteration 26: Tested latest UI changes - logo text removal, video section removal, info section addition, and AI Chart service rating. All features working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All changes verified: (1) Logo in navbar/footer shows only image - no 'TemaDom' text next to it, (2) Homepage has no video tutorial section, (3) Homepage has 'Информация за клиенти' text section, (4) AI Chart page shows service rating section after analysis results with data-testid attributes (service-rating-section, service-star-1..5, service-rating-comment, service-rating-submit, rating-thank-you), (5) Feedback endpoint accepts 'service' field, (6) Navigation 'Още' dropdown shows 'AI Чертежи' link, (7) Footer shows 'AI Чертежи' link.

backend_api_tests: POST /api/feedback with service='ai-chart' field - PASSED (stores service field)
POST /api/feedback without service field - PASSED (defaults to 'general')
frontend_ui_tests: Logo in navbar shows only image (no text) - PASSED
Logo in footer shows only image (no text) - PASSED
Homepage has NO video elements - PASSED
Homepage has 'Информация за клиенти' section - PASSED
AI Chart upload zone works - PASSED
AI Chart type selector works - PASSED
AI Chart client name input works - PASSED
AI Chart analyze button works - PASSED
AI Chart results section appears - PASSED
AI Chart service rating section visible (data-testid='service-rating-section') - PASSED
Service rating comment textarea visible (data-testid='service-rating-comment') - PASSED
Service rating submit button visible (data-testid='service-rating-submit') - PASSED
Thank you message appears after rating (data-testid='rating-thank-you') - PASSED

mocked_api_note: The /api/ai-chart/analyze endpoint uses PRESET/HARDCODED data for known chart types (stairs=3528, foundation=10061, walls=5306). This is MOCKED behavior as noted in requirements.
